phase: Phase 2 runtime materialization and component smoke
runtimeStatus: materialization passed; component-level smoke partially completed
materializationEvidence: Branch b678738 was pushed. The latest rebuilt package opened in Yeeflow as Enterprise Service Request & Compliance Review-fix fields. The app did not show Start to build with Components. The dashboard/home page appeared, navigation contained all generated lists and the approval form, Service Requests displayed custom fields and sample rows, the approval form opened, the workflow designer prompt appeared for Enterprise Service Request Review, and custom code controls were visible on dashboard, approval form, and data-list custom form surfaces.

templates.name: activity-timeline
templates.runtimeEvidence: Dashboard and approval form instances were visible but rendered empty states such as No activity yet despite seeded activity/timeline list records.

templates.name: approval-decision-panel
templates.runtimeEvidence: The review/task context that contains the approval-decision-panel was not reached during this smoke test.

templates.name: approval-timeline
templates.runtimeEvidence: Approval form instance was visible but rendered No history yet despite seeded approval-history records.

templates.name: checklist-compliance-block
templates.runtimeEvidence: Approval form checklist rendered three items, checkbox interaction changed the completion count from 1 / 3 to 3 / 3, removed the missing-required warning, and wrote checked-state JSON into the configured output field.

templates.name: dependent-selector
templates.runtimeEvidence: Approval form parent selector rendered, but the parent dropdown only showed Select and the child selector remained disabled, so source-list options/filtering were not proven.

templates.name: distribution-chart-module
templates.runtimeEvidence: Dashboard instance was visible but rendered No request records found despite Service Requests sample rows being present.

templates.name: exception-alert-panel
templates.runtimeEvidence: Dashboard instance was visible but rendered No exceptions found despite Exception Rules / Alerts sample rows being present.

templates.name: hierarchical-selector
templates.runtimeEvidence: Approval form instance was visible but rendered No hierarchy records, so hierarchy query and selection were not proven.

templates.name: kpi-card-set
templates.runtimeEvidence: Dashboard rendered KPI cards with configured values Open Requests 42, Approval Rate 91.4%, and Overdue Items 7. Data-bound KPI calculation was not proven.

templates.name: multi-entry-tag-input
templates.runtimeEvidence: Approval form tag input accepted urgent with Return, displayed the chip, updated the count to 1 / 20, and wrote ["urgent"] into the configured JSON output field.

templates.name: related-record-summary-grid
templates.runtimeEvidence: Dashboard and approval form instances were visible but rendered No related records despite seeded related-record rows.

templates.name: smart-lookup-picker
templates.runtimeEvidence: Approval form search for a returned related-record options and selecting Acme Managed Services wrote combined JSON. Data-list custom form search also returned options, selected Acme Managed Services, and wrote combined JSON plus selected values to list output fields. Dashboard instance was visible; dashboard temp-variable output was not retested in this run.

templates.name: trend-chart-module
templates.runtimeEvidence: Dashboard instance was visible but rendered No dated request records found despite Service Requests sample rows with dates.

localValidation: pass with warnings; package, graph, materialization, YWF, YDL, custom-code inspection, and wrapper round-trip checks completed with zero blocking errors
runtimeProofBoundary: Do not claim all 13 custom code templates are runtime-proven. Public form support remains untested. Analytics/timeline/query components need parameter or query-shape fixes and focused retesting before runtime support can be claimed.
